reviews.title: Old fashioned levels of service with modern stands of efficience.
reviews.body:
Old fashioned levels of service with modern stands of efficience.
Penrith offered a personalised service and were very efficient throughout, especially at the end when they organised a very rapid transfer of funds that saved us from serious problems.

reviews.body:
My go to bank
Professional, helpful , a very easy meeting , my questions answered in an informative and understandable way , good job .
II received advice allowing me to open the accounts which I required.

reviews.title: Creating a new account at Penrith Building Society
reviews.body:
Creating a new account at Penrith Building Society
Polite and friendly staff member with all the knowledge we needed to create a new account. We really appreciate the face to face banking offered at PBS
Friendly and helpful.
Very professional

Perfect if you need an expat mortgage - they are the ones to use

reviews.title: Great service

Great service
The website was very clear. All instructions to open a postal account were straightforward and when I rang to make sure I was sending the right paper work, the person was very helpful. The account was open very quickly after I had posted the application. Thank you

reviews.title: Penrith Building Society
reviews.body:
Penrith Building Society
Banked with them since I was a kid always helpful an all the staff are very friendly
Friendly, informative, knowledgeable
Smooth from start to finish.
Excellent customer service knowledgeable polite and very patient

reviews.title: Perfect lender for the individual
reviews.body:
Perfect lender for the individual
It’s hard to apply for a mortgage when you’re getting older. Most lenders have an upper age limit which constrains the length of the term and increases the payments. Penrith are a breath of fresh air. They see you in the round, holistically, and as such are a better lender for everyone, not just the more mature borrower. Everyone at Penrith is open and warm and friendly and determined to deliver the best, most appropriate, mortgage for you. I’m very impressed.

Good service
Excellent service. Extremely helpful and professional staff. Good advice given. Have been a client of PBS since I was a young child.

reviews.title: Dream Team at PBS
reviews.body:
Dream Team at PBS
Every contact we have had with the staff at the Penrith Building Society has been a first Class service. We really appreciate that. We are overseas buyers and that adds extra complexity. All handled with ease. I’d have no hesitation in recommending PBS. We are already looking forward to working with PBS on our next project planned for 2032.

I have been  with PBS for a lot of years and nothing is too much
trouble  for them, they explain everything in detail for any service
you need, I would recommend them to anyone.

reviews.title: PBS review
reviews.body:
PBS review
I have already found the the staff within PBS to be very friendly, courteous and helpful..
very  freindly and helpful staff

reviews.title: A very good experience with helpful advice. From knowledgeable staff.
reviews.body:
A very good experience with helpful advice. From knowledgeable staff.
Excellent advice lovely friendly staff.

reviews.title: Regular saver
reviews.body:
Regular saver
Easy to open and manage.

reviews.title: Very fast and thorough service
reviews.body:
Very fast and thorough service
Very fast but very thorough.  We always felt we were being treated fairly. They perhaps have a limited range of products but that is not necessarily a bad thing. You are given very clear illustrations and information about the products being offered.

Being new investors the staff were very helpful and answered all our questions.
They explained the complex procedure in simple terms, particularly the system for paying in money by bank transfer.

The service was exceptional in terms of their understanding and cooperation in persevering with us until we were ready to accept the offer of the mortgage. 
We would thoroughly recommend Penrith to future borrowers..

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.body:
Excellent
Excellent service, simple process

reviews.title: Small time operation.
reviews.body:
Small time operation.
Small time operation. Poor customer processing online

reviews.title: Online opener
reviews.body:
Online opener
Nice and easy to open an account online. The rate on the regular saver is competitive and for a surprising 2 year duration allowing me to build up a bigger wad of cash!!! 😭

reviews.title: Penrith BS should - "Hold your heads up high"
reviews.body:
Penrith BS should - "Hold your heads up high"
It is important to support Building Societies and particularly those small identities such as Penrith BS. But it is equally important that they provide a level of customer savings and quality of service. Penrith BS achieves all this and more. I would thank them from how they have treated me without hesitation. So please thank all the staff for me for their care and service to me as well as providing a good safe savings product. You should all hold your heads up high.
